description: A faithful Codex pet recreation of a round chibi fishing cat sitting in an integrated little boat seat, with a fluffy white pom-pom hat, big round eyes, a small blue-gray fish, and a thin fishing rod with line and bobber.

idle.notes: Quiet seated fishing idle with gentle breathing, tiny blink, and small rod and bobber sway.

walk.notes: Directional scene-glide rows used for movement and drag-facing behavior; Nib stays seated in the fishing base.

curious.notes: Eyes widen and head leans forward as if the bobber twitched.

happy.notes: Restrained satisfied smile with a tiny fish wiggle; not a literal waving gesture.

sleep.notes: Dozy fishing rest with closed eyes and lowered head while the rod and fish remain visible.

focused_fishing.notes: Slightly more active in-place fishing loop with careful rod adjustment.

tiny_bobber_hop.notes: Tiny buoyant hop triggered by a bobber tug while Nib stays seated.

slumped_miss.notes: Gentle low-energy miss-the-bite reaction with the fishing setup intact.

walk_right.notes: Rightward scene-glide row; Nib remains seated in the fishing base.

walk_left.notes: Leftward scene-glide row; Nib remains seated in the fishing base.

drag.notes: Directional drag uses dedicated left and right scene-glide strips with the rod, bobber, and fish kept directionally aligned.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses a true left-facing strip
right drag uses a true right-facing strip
walk_left and walk_right are not swapped
the cat, base, rod, line, bobber, and fish stay directionally unified in both glide rows
left drag never faces right and right drag never faces left
